short.en: Store GLPI documents in cloud storage providers (Azure Blob, AWS S3)
short.pt_BR: Armazene documentos GLPI em provedores de armazenamento cloud (Azure Blob, AWS S3)

long.en:
Cloud Storage plugin for GLPI allows storing documents in cloud providers instead of the local filesystem.
Features: - Azure Blob Storage support (AWS S3 planned) - Two storage modes: Cloud Primary (cloud only) and Cloud Backup (local + cloud) - Two download methods: Redirect (SAS URL) and Proxy (stream through GLPI) - SHA1-based deduplication to avoid duplicate uploads - CLI commands for batch migration (to cloud and back to local) - Automatic migration from the legacy Azure Blob Storage plugin - Encrypted credential storage via GLPI's SECURED_CONFIGS - Comprehensive security: path traversal prevention, credential sanitization, HTTPS-only SAS URLs
long.pt_BR:
Plugin Cloud Storage para GLPI permite armazenar documentos em provedores cloud ao inves do sistema de arquivos local.
Funcionalidades: - Suporte a Azure Blob Storage (AWS S3 planejado) - Dois modos: Cloud Primary (somente cloud) e Cloud Backup (local + cloud) - Dois metodos de download: Redirect (URL SAS) e Proxy (stream via GLPI) - Deduplicacao baseada em SHA1 para evitar uploads duplicados - Comandos CLI para migracao em lote (para cloud e de volta ao local) - Migracao automatica do plugin legado Azure Blob Storage - Credenciais criptografadas via SECURED_CONFIGS do GLPI - Seguranca abrangente: prevencao de path traversal, sanitizacao de credenciais, SAS URLs HTTPS-only
